name: GIGABYTE Z590I VISION D Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Intel Z590 Chipset - Supports DDR4-3200 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - Intel Thunderbolt 4 USB Type-C - DisplayPort - Intel 2.5GbE LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6 802.11ax
shortName: GIGABYTE Z590I VISION D Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200
description: Compact Mini-ITX motherboard for Intel 10th gen with Z590 chipset, Thunderbolt 4, and Wi-Fi 6 for ITX builds.
